title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Chandigarh University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Chandigarh University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Chandigarh University:
Chandigarh University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Support students with special educational needs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Chandigarh University!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
